title: Thai Sea Bass in Sweet Treat Sauce
description: A simple yet flavorful Thai dish featuring pan-seared sea bass in a sweet and tangy sauce, served with steamed vegetables.
instructions: 1. In a small bowl, whisk together sweet chili sauce, fish sauce, palm sugar, and lime juice.
2. Heat 1 tablespoon of vegetable oil in a pan over medium-high heat.
3. Add the sea bass fillets and cook for 3-4 minutes on each side, or until cooked through.
4. Remove the sea bass from the pan and set aside.
5. In the same pan, add the remaining 1 tablespoon of vegetable oil.
6. Add the minced garlic and cook for 1 minute, until fragrant.
7. Stir in the chili flakes and cook for 1 minute.
8. Pour the sweet chili sauce mixture into the pan and bring to a simmer.
9. Reduce the heat to low and cook for 2-3 minutes, until the sauce has thickened.
10. Serve the sea bass with the sweet chili sauce spooned over the top.
11. Garnish with chopped Thai basil and serve immediately.
